title: Fungus Brew Trade
hook: A dangerous brew derived from the fungus Durog survived is moving through the city.
playerSummary: The party can trace distributors, refiners, and street-level fallout from the fungus brew trade.
gmTruth: This is a core Durog thread. Use it for street dealers, hidden labs, raids, and the moral horror of a market built on the same corruption that nearly consumed him.
